mechanics.excerpt: EQUIPMENT does not stun the character; nor must the character make Knockout Check; Fatigue sustained normally: Type myomer replacement functions as normal limb for damage ourposes. Damage suffered by artificial limbs can repaired with the appropriate skills, such as Technician/ Electronics for Type and limbs . Damaged myomer limbs must be repaired at specially equipped hospital and requires Surgery and Technician/Myomer Skills Modifiers Action Checks for replacement limbs are based on tne modifiers for the Lost Limb Trait (p 831.
